ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression, clustering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model was uploaded */,
  "framework" TEXT /* The machine learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the model was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric used for evaluation (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_version_id" INTEGER /* The version of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the evaluation process */,
  "evaluation_environment" TEXT /* The environment where the evaluation was performed (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_evaluation_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* The status of the version (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this input belongs to */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Data used as input for the model */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* The type of input (e.g., training, validation, test) */,
  "input_size" TEXT /* The size of the input data */,
  "input_format" TEXT /* The format of the input data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this output belongs to */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Data generated by the model */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* The type of output (e.g., predictions, evaluation results) */,
  "output_size" TEXT /* The size of the output data */,
  "output_format" TEXT /* The format of the output data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* The type of hyperparameter (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* The default value of the hyperparameter */,
  "range_min" TEXT /* The minimum value of the hyperparameter range */,
  "range_max" TEXT /* The maximum value of the hyperparameter range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* The type of comment (e.g., feedback, suggestion) */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* The status of the comment (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "local_sigma" REAL /* Local sigma of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_sigma" REAL /* Neighborhood sigma of the neighborhood */,
  "object" TEXT /* Object of the neighborhood */,
  "plausibility" REAL /* Plausibility of the neighborhood */,
  "predicate" TEXT /* Predicate of the neighborhood */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)
